title: Debt-funded financial defense loses ground to modular settlement rails

news.title: Republic Treasury rolls more short-term debt to defend its banking corridor
news.summary: Officials rely on refinancing and emergency guarantees to preserve confidence in state-linked lenders.

news.title: Merchants adopt a stablecoin settlement cooperative to avoid payment delays
news.summary: The new rail avoids bank funding friction and removes part of the incumbent balance-sheet bottleneck.

market.title: Funding spreads widen for lenders reliant on treasury support
market.summary: Balance-sheet defense is becoming more expensive just as modular payment alternatives gain user trust.

market.title: Treasury bill demand shortens while collateral software vendors see onboarding demand
market.summary: Users prefer optionality and cleaner settlement over longer exposure to policy defense reflexes.

dark.title: Informal dealer channels report faster merchant migration than official volumes imply
dark.summary: The gray edge is adapting more quickly than the regulated core can track in real time.

dark.title: Treasury-linked banks see rising account churn chatter among export-heavy firms
dark.summary: Private discussions point to trust erosion and concern that the state must spend more just to defend the same deposit base.
